zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Murdac於1095年出生在英國奧可福爾維特尼時，他的父親Ralph Meurdach36歲，母親Juliana de Chesney27歲。他和Beatrice de Cheyne至少有2個女兒。他去世於大約1130年在英國越可爾拉辛比享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Murdac于1095年出生在英国奧可福爾維特尼时，他的父亲Ralph Meurdach36岁，母亲Juliana de Chesney27岁。他和Beatrice de Cheyne至少有2个女儿。他去世于大约1130年在英国越可爾拉辛比享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Murdac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Murdoch
meanings: Scottish: from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal names Muireadhach ‘mariner’, Murchadh ‘sea-warrior’, and Muircheartach ‘sea-ruler’, the first element in each being muir ‘sea’. The personal name was introduced into Yorkshire and Normandy by Norsemen from Ireland as early as the 10th century. The surname in post-Conquest medieval England usually belongs to Norman families.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Murdac was born in 1095, in Witney, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Ralph Meurdach, was 36 and his mother, Juliana de Chesney, was 27. He had at least 2 daughters with Beatrice de Cheyne. He died about 1130, in Lazenby, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Murdac est né en 1095, à Witney, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Meurdach, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Chesney, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Beatrice de Cheyne. Il est décédé environ 1130, à Lazenby, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Murdac 1095 in Witney, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Meurdach 36 und seine Mutter Juliana de Chesney 27. Er hatte mit Beatrice de Cheyne mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1130 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Lazenby, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Murdac è nato il nel 1095 nel Witney, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Meurdach, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Chesney, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Beatrice de Cheyne. Morì circa 1130, nel Lazenby, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Murdacが1095年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウィトニーで生まれた時，父Ralph Meurdachは36歳，母Juliana de Chesneyは27歳であった。彼はBeatrice de Cheyneとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1130年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラズエンビーで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Murdac(이)가 1095년 영국 스퍼드실르 윗니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Meurdach(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Chesney(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Beatrice de Cheyne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1130년 영국 요르크실르 라비에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Deddington, Berkshire, England: Eddington, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Murdac nasceu em 1095, em Witney, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Meurdach, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Chesney, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Beatrice de Cheyne. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1130, em Lazenby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Murdac родился в 1095 г. в местности витни, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Meurdach было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Chesney, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Beatrice de Cheyne. Он умер около 1130 г. в местности лазенби, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Murdac nació en 1095, en Witney, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Meurdach, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Juliana de Chesney, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Beatrice de Cheyne. Murió aproximadamente 1130, en Lazenby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
